series_metadata.series_description: Files documenting public records requests and responses of the Ohio Attorney General's Office (AGO) pursuant to ORC 149.43. Records include, but are not limited to, the original request, correspondence between the AGO and the requester, internal correspondence, and copies of responsive records.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: from request completion. ; Paper: from request completion. If scanned and saved electronically, dispose of paper immediately
